name: Frontier Buffalo Cowboy Steak on Watercress
recipeIngredient: 3 candy cane beets, peeled, baked, julienne and cooled
1/3 pound haricots verts, picked, blanched and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl combine the kosher salt, brown sugar, chipotle powder, and black pepper. Rub the ingredients onto both sides of the steak.
2. Blend all vinaigrette ingredients in a blender until smooth.
3. Sprinkle 1 ounce of the rub mixture on one side of the steak. Rub the mix into the meat.
4. Let the steak sit for 30 minutes.
5. Grill or sauté the steak over high heat for 7 minutes, then turn off and cook for another 7 minutes. Turn on the first side and cook for 4 minutes, then repeat on the other side. Allow the steak to rest for ten minutes.
6. Place watercress and totsouy on a plate. Add sliced tomatoes in alternating colors.
7. Slice the beef and place it on the plate. Garnish with beets and beans.
8. Drizzle the dressing around the salad.
